name: Mailchimp Transactional Email
shortDescription: High-performance transactional email delivery platform with advanced template management, tracking capabilities, and comprehensive analytics.

actions.name: Send Message
actions.description: Sends a new transactional message through the Mailchimp Transactional API. Supports rich HTML content, tracking options, merge variables, attachments, and advanced delivery settings for professional email campaigns.

actions.name: Get Templates List
actions.description: Returns a list of all the templates available to this user. Templates are reusable email designs that can be used to send consistent messages across your campaigns.

actions.name: Add Template
actions.description: Adds a new template to your account. Templates allow you to create reusable email designs with editable regions that can be customized for each campaign.

actions.name: Send With Template
actions.description: Sends a new transactional message through the Transactional API using a template. Templates provide consistent branding and allow dynamic content injection into predefined editable regions.

actions.name: Get Tags List
actions.description: Returns all of the user-defined tag information. Tags help categorize and track the performance of your email campaigns with detailed analytics and statistics.

actions.name: Get Message Info
actions.description: Gets the information for a single recently sent message. Provides detailed tracking data including opens, clicks, and delivery status for message analysis and troubleshooting.

actions.name: Ping
actions.description: Validates an API key and respond to a ping. This is a simple health check method to verify your API connection and credentials are working correctly.

actions.name: Get Rejections List
actions.description: Retrieves your email rejection denylist. You can provide an email address to limit the results. Returns up to 1000 results with detailed rejection reasons and timestamps for managing email deliverability.

actions.name: Add Rejection
actions.description: Adds an email to your email rejection denylist. Addresses that you add manually will never expire and there is no reputation penalty for removing them from your denylist.

actions.name: Get User Info
actions.description: Returns the information about the API-connected user. Provides account details including reputation score, sending quotas, and comprehensive historical statistics across different time periods.

idealUseCases: Transactional email delivery for e-commerce and SaaS applications
Password reset and account verification email automation
Order confirmation and shipping notification systems
Automated invoice and receipt email delivery
System alerts and monitoring notification distribution
Template-based email campaigns with dynamic content
Email deliverability management and blacklist monitoring
Advanced email tracking and analytics reporting
